task:
Add a 'Start Now (YOLO)' button to the /builder page (src/app/builder/page.tsx) on Step 1, next to or below the existing 'Plan Sprints' button. When clicked, it should:

1. Run the same planning flow as handlePlan (POST /api/builder/plan)
2. Once sprints are returned, auto-negotiate ALL contracts sequentially (POST /api/builder/negotiate for each sprint, same as negotiateAll)
3. Once all negotiated, auto-queue ALL sprints (same logic as handleQueueAll — POST /api/builder/save then POST /api/sprints/run for each)
4. Show a progress indicator during the whole flow (e.g. 'Planning…' → 'Negotiating contracts…' → 'Queuing sprints…')
5. On success, clear localStorage and redirect to /live
6. On error at any stage, show an error message and allow the user to fall back to the normal review flow (dump them on Step 2 with whatever sprints were planned)

Button styling: Use a secondary/bold style to differentiate from 'Plan Sprints'. Use the Rocket icon from lucide-react. Label: 'Start Now (YOLO)'. The button should be disabled when no prompt is entered or when either flow is in progress.

This is a self-contained change in the builder page component — reuse the existing handlePlan, negotiateSprint, negotiateAll, and handleQueueAll logic by extracting/refactoring as needed within the same file. Keep it simple — no new API routes needed.
